General.Name: Asia Energy Logistics Group Ltd
General.Description: Asia Energy Logistics Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides shipping and logistics services in the People's Republic of China. The company operates a fleet of dry bulk carriers with a total carrying capacity of approximately 32,000 DWT. It also engages in e-commerce trading of computer products; and telecommunications service-related business. Asia Energy Logistics Group Limited was incorporated in 1991 and is headquartered in Admiralty, Hong Kong.
General.Address: One Pacific Place, Admiralty, Hong Kong
